testcase.name: Validate course listing API with different conditions #1
testcase.system-out:
@course Scenario Outline: Validate course listing API with different conditions # src/test/resources/features/course.feature:14 Running on ENV: qa Given the base URI is set # stepDefinitions.CourseStep.the_base_uri_is_set() And I set authorization token as "valid" # stepDefinitions.CourseStep.set_token(java.lang.String) And I set endpoint as "valid" # stepDefinitions.CourseStep.set_endpoint(java.lang.String) Request method: GET Request URI: https://qa-spartans-rqi1stop.laerdalblr.in/v1/api/organizations/11021605/users/2100560163/merge/curricula Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer 89679|Pz59p73ATn9e7m4tnQ12zK5qPFdpp94OixmUSbgD0ae175ea Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sat, 18 Apr 2026 17:53:13 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: nginx vary: Origin cache-control: no-cache, private phpdebugbar-id: 01KPGVKB3R3BGK333H978FQEM0 x-content-type-options: nosniff Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=15768000
{ "data": [ { "curriculum_id": 1093, "curriculum_name": "hjgdjahd ajhdsgajsdh adasdhajdhajhdgajsdhgajsdhgajsdhajshbdaj Ruecker - Kemmer", "curriculam_status": "Y", "total_courses": null, "total_completed_courses": null, "complaint_until": null, "ecard_until": null, "is_recurrence": 1, "session": null, "is_perpetual": 0, "status": "active" }, { "curriculum_id": 1092, "curriculum_name": "HeartCode® 2025 ACLS Complete", "curriculam_status": "Y", "total_courses": null, "total_completed_courses": null, "complaint_until": null, "ecard_until": null, "is_recurrence": 0, "session": null, "is_perpetual": 0, "status": "" } ] } When I send GET request to course listing API # stepDefinitions.CourseStep.i_send_get_request() Then the response status code should be 200 # stepDefinitions.CourseStep.validate_status(int) And I validate response based on "success" # stepDefinitions.CourseStep.validate_response(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: Validate course listing API with different conditions #2
testcase.system-out:
@course Scenario Outline: Validate course listing API with different conditions # src/test/resources/features/course.feature:15 Given the base URI is set # stepDefinitions.CourseStep.the_base_uri_is_set() And I set authorization token as "invalid" # stepDefinitions.CourseStep.set_token(java.lang.String) And I set endpoint as "valid" # stepDefinitions.CourseStep.set_endpoint(java.lang.String) Request method: GET Request URI: https://qa-spartans-rqi1stop.laerdalblr.in/v1/api/organizations/11021605/users/2100560163/merge/curricula Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Authorization=Bearer 89243|AJQrr33d4dx2NN5jeDS5SD4kIZyYzrDvwG9dJTIQkt1Ra819b735 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized Date: Sat, 18 Apr 2026 17:53:14 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: nginx vary: Origin cache-control: no-cache, private phpdebugbar-id: 01KPGVKC1TDRNH4DYJEAF6GR2S x-content-type-options: nosniff Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=15768000
{ "message": "Unauthenticated." } When I send GET request to course listing API # stepDefinitions.CourseStep.i_send_get_request() Then the response status code should be 401 # stepDefinitions.CourseStep.validate_status(int) And I validate response based on "error" # stepDefinitions.CourseStep.validate_response(java.lang.String)
